channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Common constipation drug may help clear depression brain fog
item.description: An existing constipation drug may have an unexpected new use: helping clear the "brain fog" that often lingers after depression. In a small clinical t...

item.title: NASA's James Webb Space Telescope reveals a strange atmosphere on a hellish lava planet
item.description: NASA's James Webb Space Telescope has revealed new details about the blistering lava planet 55 Cancri e, where temperatures are high enough to melt ro...

item.title: Quantum breakthrough links light and magnetism in atomically thin materials
item.description: A new review highlights exciting progress in atomically thin quantum materials where light and magnetism work together in ways never before possible.

item.title: Archaeologists found Homer's Iliad inside a 1,600-year-old Egyptian mummy
item.description: A 1,600-year-old mummy discovered in Egypt has revealed something archaeologists had never seen before: a fragment of Homer’s Iliad used during embalming.
